name: TC-OT-003 — GET /api/v1/token: token_type is exactly "Bearer"
description:
**What this test does:**
Verifies the token_type field in the response body is the string "Bearer" (case-sensitive).

**Why it matters:** OAuth 2.0 clients use token_type to determine how to attach the token to requests. An unexpected value (e.g. "bearer", "JWT") causes clients to construct malformed Authorization headers.
descriptionHtml:
What this test does:
Verifies the token_type field in the response body is the string "Bearer" (case-sensitive).

Why it matters: OAuth 2.0 clients use token_type to determine how to attach the token to requests. An unexpected value (e.g. "bearer", "JWT") causes clients to construct malformed Authorization headers.
